mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM dylan_liuli WHERE del_flag = '0'
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM dylan_liuli WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS name, COUNT(id) AS value FROM dylan_liuli WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY name
SELECT dc.name AS name, COUNT(dl.id) AS value FROM dylan_liuli dl LEFT JOIN dylan_catagory dc ON dl.liuli_cat = dc.id WHERE dl.del_flag = '0' AND dc.name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dc.name
SELECT dt.name AS name, COUNT(dlt.tag_id) AS value FROM dylan_liuli_tag dlt LEFT JOIN dylan_tag dt ON dlt.tag_id = dt.id GROUP BY dt.name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT publish_author AS name, COUNT(id) AS value FROM dylan_liuli WHERE del_flag = '0' AND publish_author IS NOT NULL AND publish_author != '' GROUP BY publish_author ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT #{limit}
